allow: PowerShell($dir = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\gh-cli"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $dir | Out-Null; $zip = "$env:TEMP\\gh.zip"; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://github.com/cli/cli/releases/download/v2.96.0/gh_2.96.0_windows_amd64.zip" -OutFile $zip; Expand-Archive $zip $dir -Force; Remove-Item $zip -Confirm:$false; & "$dir\\gh_2.96.0_windows_amd64\\bin\\gh.exe" --version)
